notes: v1.14.160 - Icon-pack decontamination (asset-only re-ship). All 37 live icons re-exported to remove a systemic 1-2px white anti-alias fringe left by the original knockouts (audit: 11,757 edge-residue px -> 512; remaining = legit steel speculars / crystal facets). Same 37 filenames, drop-in overwrite -> NO markup/CSS/precache-list change; the 3-stamp CACHE_VERSION bump busts devices onto the clean set. Canvas dims preserved exactly (6 optic/assistant icons keep their existing sub-256 content-bbox dims, VERIFIED byte-for-byte identical geometry to live - no re-crop regression). Ships as .160 (not .159) because .159 command-discipline B/C/D already deployed, so same-name cleaned icons need a fresh cache key to reach devices. NOT included: phantom-tool-burndown / phantom-tool-audits (staged for the R1 DEPLOY_TOOLS decouple ship). DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP): assistant-mark crystal (Ask card / hub cards) white halo gone, art crisp (worst-offender spot check); no icon renders smaller/misplaced. ROLLBACK: git checkout HEAD~1 -- icons/ + revert 3 stamps.
